D2D serdes status and control

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x694
Size:
0x4
Source:
syscon_rf.rdl

Description

Note: TRM misspells this register name as 'd2d_stauts'.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] d2d_status_misc r 0x0 [0]=srds_cpu_sys_halt
[7:5] - - - -
[4] d2d_serdes_status_i r 0x0 tx phy ready from other die
[3:1] - - - -
[0] d2d_serdes_status_o rw 0x0 tx phy ready output to other die
